stem: Nina earns $\$25.00$ per hour for a standard $38$-hour week. Calculate her annual leave loading.
hint: Leave loading $= 17.5\%$ of four weeks' normal pay. First find four weeks' pay, then multiply by $0.175$.

stem: Daniel earns $\$18.40$ per hour and works a standard $38$-hour week. Calculate his annual leave loading.
hint: Leave loading $= 17.5\%$ of four weeks' normal pay.

stem: Chloe earns a fixed wage of $\$620.00$ per week. Calculate her annual leave loading.
Patrick earns $\$28.50$ per hour for a standard $38$-hour week. How much leave loading does he receive?
hint: Leave loading $= 17.5\%$ of four weeks' normal pay.

stem: A factory worker is paid $\$0.85$ per item on a piecework basis. She assembles $240$ items in a day. Calculate her daily earnings.
hint: Piecework earnings $=$ rate per item $\times$ number of items.

stem: A real-estate agent earns a commission of $6\%$ on all sales. She sells a property for $\$8500$. Calculate her commission.
A data-entry worker is paid $\$1.20$ per form processed. He processes $185$ forms in a shift. Calculate his earnings for that shift.
hint: Piecework earnings $=$ rate per item $\times$ number of items.

stem: A car salesperson earns a commission of $4.5\%$ on total sales. This month her total sales were $\$12\,400$. Calculate her commission.
hint: Commission $=$ commission rate $\times$ total sales. Convert the percentage to a decimal first.

stem: Aisha has an annual base salary of $\$45\,760$ (which is $\$880$ per week). She receives annual leave loading of $17.5\%$ on four weeks' normal pay, and earns a commission of $3\%$ on $\$72\,000$ of sales. Calculate her total annual income.
hint: Calculate leave loading and commission separately, then add both to the base salary.

stem: Marcus has an annual base salary of $\$52\,000$ (which is $\$1000$ per week). He receives leave loading of $17.5\%$ on four weeks' normal pay, and earns royalties of $\$1850$. Calculate his total annual income.
hint: Find leave loading from four weeks' weekly pay, then add all income sources together.

stem: Sophie has an annual base salary of $\$62\,400$ (which is $\$1200$ per week). She receives leave loading of $17.5\%$ on four weeks' normal pay, and earns a commission of $5\%$ on $\$42\,000$ in sales. Calculate her total annual income.
hint: Calculate leave loading and commission separately, then add both to the base salary.

stem: Tom has an annual base salary of $\$54\,080$ (which is $\$1040$ per week). He receives leave loading of $17.5\%$ on four weeks' normal pay, earns royalties of $\$2400$, and earns a commission of $2\%$ on $\$35\,000$ in sales. Calculate his total annual income.
hint: There are four components: base salary, leave loading, royalties, and commission. Calculate each and add.
